description: A fine feast made for heroes.
name: Feast

description: A potion for restoring a moderate amount of health.

description: A potion for restoring full health.
name: Superior Healing Potion

description: An elixir for restoring half mana.

description: An elixir for restoring full mana.
name: Greater Elixir

description: A fine feast made for heroes. Restores a small amount of health and mana.
name: Feast

description:
A feast for the realms best. Restores a moderate amount of health and mana.
Cures all ailments except \it[1].
name: Bountiful Feast

description: A piece of copper ore used for crafting.
name: Copper Ore

description: A piece of tin ore used for crafting.
name: Tin Ore

description: A piece of ash wood for crafting.
name: Ash Wood

description: A purple flower used in healing pastes.
name: Lavendertail

description:
This scallion like herb is usually used in spiritual
restoring pastes because of its freshness.
name: Lion's Breath

description: A small, furled, weed that is commonly used in healing pastes.
name: Winterclover

description:
This foul smelling cherry is said to liven up anyone and
invigorate them with energy.
name: Stinkcherry

description: These herbs are usually used to cure various poisonings.
name: Devilparsley

description:
An old acorn of an even older pine tree that is cool to
the touch.
name: Elderpine

description: A poultice jar used to store different pastes in.
name: Poultice Jar

description: A piece of cloth used in armour manufacture.
name: Silk Cloth

description:
A powder that when used on a wound, stings and increases
healing on the specific part.
name: Disinfectant Powder

description:
The note that was found at the blacksmith. Maybe the town 
leader knows how to decipher the text.
name: Blacksmith's note

description: The head of the cultist leader from the forest cave.
name: Cultist Leader's Head
